mockTickets.subject: Credit card declined on renewal
mockTickets.description: I tried to renew my Pro subscription but got a 'card declined' error. Money was deducted from my account but the subscription didn't activate. I need this fixed ASAP as my team relies on this tool.

mockTickets.subject: API integration documentation missing
mockTickets.description: I'm trying to integrate your REST API but the webhook section of the docs is completely blank. I need to know how to receive real-time updates when users upload files. Can you point me to the right docs?

mockTickets.subject: I was overcharged - duplicate charges
mockTickets.description: Last month I was charged twice for the same month. I only have one subscription but I see two line items on my invoice dated Dec 1st and Dec 3rd. Both for $99. Please refund the duplicate.

mockTickets.subject: Can't login to dashboard - 403 error
mockTickets.description: Since yesterday morning I've been getting 403 Forbidden errors when trying to access my dashboard. My password is correct (I reset it). I'm seeing this on Chrome and Firefox. Other team members can login fine. What's going on?

mockTickets.subject: Feature request: bulk upload
mockTickets.description: It would be amazing if we could upload 100+ files at once. Right now we can only do 10 per batch. Our workflow involves processing large batches daily.

mockTickets.subject: 502 Bad Gateway on all requests
mockTickets.description: For the last 30 minutes, every API call returns 502 Bad Gateway. Our production system is down. This is urgent!

mockTickets.subject: Subscription downgrade not working
mockTickets.description: I tried to downgrade from Enterprise to Pro last week but my billing still shows Enterprise pricing. I was charged $999 instead of $99. My account settings show Pro but the invoice is wrong.

mockTickets.subject: Password reset email not arriving
mockTickets.description: I clicked 'forgot password' but never received the reset email. I've checked spam folder, it's not there. I need to access my account urgently.

mockTickets.subject: Batch processing timeout - 50k records
mockTickets.description: When I try to process 50,000 records, the batch times out after 5 minutes. Is there a size limit? How do I process larger datasets?

mockTickets.subject: Can I export billing history?
mockTickets.description: I need to export my invoices for the last 12 months for accounting purposes. I don't see an export option in the settings. Where is it?

mockTickets.subject: Team member can't accept invite
mockTickets.description: I invited someone@domain.com to my team workspace but they're getting an error 'User does not have access to team feature'. I'm on the Pro plan which should support team collaboration. What's wrong?

mockTickets.subject: Non-profit discount eligibility
mockTickets.description: We're a registered 501(c)(3). Do you offer non-profit discounts? If so, how do I apply? Our budget is limited and a discount would help us expand the tool to more team members.

mockTickets.subject: OAuth/SSO integration broken
mockTickets.description: We have OAuth setup for GitHub login but since this morning logins fail with 'Callback URL mismatch'. I haven't changed anything on our side. Can you check your OAuth config?

mockTickets.subject: GDPR data export request
mockTickets.description: I need all my personal data in machine-readable format per GDPR. I don't see a download option. How do I request this?

mockTickets.subject: Refund request - trial didn't work out
mockTickets.description: I tried the 14-day free trial but it wasn't right for our workflow. I was charged on day 15 even though I cancelled before the trial ended. Can I get a refund?

mockTickets.subject: Export data to CSV not working
mockTickets.description: The 'Export to CSV' button on the dashboard does nothing. No file downloads, no error message. I need to export my data for a client report.

mockTickets.subject: Upgrade to Enterprise - custom domain
mockTickets.description: If I upgrade to Enterprise, can I get a custom domain for my user portal? Like portal.mycompany.com instead of mycompany.portal.com?

mockTickets.subject: Invoice shows wrong amount
mockTickets.description: My latest invoice shows $199 but I should be charged $99 (Pro plan). My account settings correctly show Pro. This has been wrong for 2 months. Please fix and issue a refund for the overcharge.

mockTickets.subject: Student/educational license
mockTickets.description: Are there discounted licenses for educational institutions? We'd like to teach students your platform but can't afford full commercial pricing.

mockTickets.subject: Rate limiting - hitting limits too fast
mockTickets.description: Our app hits rate limits even with only 10 req/sec. The docs say limits are 100 req/sec. Is something broken on the API?

mockTickets.subject: Account deleted accidentally - restore?
mockTickets.description: I accidentally deleted my entire workspace. Is there a recovery option or backup I can restore? I deleted it 5 minutes ago - hopefully it's not permanent?

mockTickets.subject: Currency/localization support
mockTickets.description: Your platform only shows USD pricing. Can I see pricing in EUR? Our team is in France and it makes budgeting difficult.

mockTickets.subject: HIPAA compliance - where's BAA?
mockTickets.description: We want to use your service for patient data but need a Business Associate Agreement for HIPAA compliance. Do you offer one?

mockTickets.subject: Integration with Zapier broken
mockTickets.description: Our Zapier integration suddenly stopped working. We get 'Invalid API key' but the key hasn't changed. What happened?

mockTickets.subject: License key management - seat limits
mockTickets.description: We have an Enterprise license but want to increase seats from 10 to 20. How do we do this and what's the pricing?

mockTickets.subject: Database backup - how often?
mockTickets.description: What's your database backup frequency and retention policy? Critical for our disaster recovery planning.

mockTickets.subject: Annual billing discount - when available?
mockTickets.description: Do you offer discounts for annual upfront payment? We want to commit long-term but need a better rate.

mockTickets.subject: Offline mode capability
mockTickets.description: Can the platform work offline? Our team sometimes works on job sites without reliable internet. Sync when back online?

mockTickets.subject: White-label/reseller program
mockTickets.description: We want to resell your platform to our clients under our brand. Is there a white-label program and what are the terms?

mockTickets.subject: Video/multimedia support - upload limit
mockTickets.description: We need to upload HD video files but get 'File size exceeds limit'. What's the max file size? Can we increase it?
